name: Baked Green Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green tomatoes in half and arrange them in an oiled shallow casserole.
2. Season each half with salt and pepper.
3. Spread a tablespoon of brown sugar on each tomato half.
4. Cover each half with coarse butter-cracker crumbs and dot with butter.
5. Bake at 350°F until tender but still firm. The baking time will depend on the size and greenness of the tomatoes, typically ranging from 30 to 40 minutes.
Note: If using 1/2 inch slices, bake for approximately 25 minutes.
